---
title: "Israeli Couscous Salad"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Salads"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   Pearl couscous

    -   Cook with a bit of oil

-   Israeli Dressing

    -   ¼ cup Olive Oil

    -   1 tbsp Lemon Juice

    -   3 tbsp Harissa

    -   2-4 tbsp White Wine Vinegar

        -   Depending on acidity preference

    -   Thyme

    -   Salt

    -   Black Pepper

-   Bell Peppers

-   Kalamata Olives

-   Unsalted Sunflower Kernels

-   Scallions (Green onion)

-   Spinach
